locations.name: Reigate & Banstead
locations.description: Opening hours: 8am-10pm daily. 2 parking spaces available including one disabled. In exceptional circumstances opening times may vary dependent on staff availability. Please call main switchboard for daily confirmation. Bank Holiday 9am-5pm
locations.address:
Please visit the Surrey Police website at www.surrey.police.uk to contact your local team or to
•	report crime and other incidents to us
•	obtain advice and information
•	request our services
•	give us feedback
•	find your nearest police station
